mapper.sql: notice_id, module_instance_id, state_record_id, module_type, notice_type, notice_title, notice_no, publish_unit, publish_user_id, publish_time, notice_scope, target_dept_scope, target_user_scope, project_category, is_limited_project, limit_count, start_time, deadline_time, material_requirement_summary, content_summary, remark, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM notice_record WHERE module_type = #{moduleType} ORDER BY notice_id DESC
SELECT FROM notice_record ORDER BY notice_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice_record (module_instance_id, state_record_id, module_type, notice_type, notice_title, notice_no, publish_unit, publish_user_id, publish_time, notice_scope, target_dept_scope, target_user_scope, project_category, is_limited_project, limit_count, start_time, deadline_time, material_requirement_summary, content_summary, remark, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{moduleInstanceId}, #{stateRecordId}, #{moduleType}, #{noticeType}, #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeNo}, #{publishUnit}, #{publishUserId}, #{publishTime}, #{noticeScope}, #{targetDeptScope}, #{targetUserScope}, #{projectCategory}, #{isLimitedProject}, #{limitCount}, #{startTime}, #{deadlineTime}, #{materialRequirementSummary}, #{contentSummary}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE notice_record SET module_instance_id=#{moduleInstanceId}, state_record_id=#{stateRecordId}, module_type=#{moduleType}, notice_type=#{noticeType}, notice_title=#{noticeTitle}, notice_no=#{noticeNo}, publish_unit=#{publishUnit}, publish_user_id=#{publishUserId}, publish_time=#{publishTime}, notice_scope=#{noticeScope}, target_dept_scope=#{targetDeptScope}, target_user_scope=#{targetUserScope}, project_category=#{projectCategory}, is_limited_project=#{isLimitedProject}, limit_count=#{limitCount}, start_time=#{startTime}, deadline_time=#{deadlineTime}, material_requirement_summary=#{materialRequirementSummary}, content_summary=#{contentSummary}, remark=#{remark}, updated_at=#{updatedAt} WHERE notice_id=#{noticeId}
